serverNeeds.description: C3-CONTINGENT (D1 send boundary, locked out of C1/C2 by D4 Q4): a 'staged' marker on insight rows + a staged-only client read projection so the portal renders only operator-sent insights. Not needed for the C1/C2-scoped rebuild.
serverNeeds.evidence: rg -i 'staged|staging' server/analytics-insights-store.ts server/client-insight-narrative-view-model.ts shared/types/analytics.ts = 0 hits; narrative view filters only impactScore/type (client-insight-narrative-view-model.ts:12-53)

serverNeeds.description: C3-CONTINGENT (D1's dark-loop guard + D3 greenlight loop): 'unstaged insights' nudge count for operators, and an insight->client-request graduation write path. Explicitly not scoped for C1/C2.
serverNeeds.evidence: Unresolved-queue read exists (server/routes/insights.ts:15-23, MCP get_unresolved_insights); no staged/nudge or insight->request graduation path (grep above = 0)

openQuestions.question: Q1 Auto-surface vs staged send boundary for client insights (A1/A2/D1): retire, retain, or hybrid?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: D4 Q4 already defers the send boundary to C3 — so C2 default is carry over auto-surfacing (feed re-mounted in the re-skinned Overview/Results), staged model revisited per-idea at C3.

openQuestions.question: Q2 Which client Overview is the parity baseline — D4 answers TheIssueClientPage, but it mounts none of InsightsDigest/MonthlyDigest/IntelligenceSummaryCard; where do those capabilities re-home after legacy retirement (hard floor: no deletion without a named home)?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Re-home the narrative feed + digest into C2 Overview ('Also detected' section) and Results tab; decide per-card at C2 dispatch.

openQuestions.question: Q3 Tier gating on the re-skinned client surfaces (B5) — which sections gated at which tier?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Preserve HEAD gating exactly (TierGate growth+ on digest + win rate); ungating is a monetization change requiring separate sign-off.

openQuestions.question: Q4 Automated monthly digest (B2): auto-render in the new client surface, or operator-composed with digest as draft?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Auto-render carry-over in C2 (zero behavior change per D4); operator-composed variant is a C3 idea.

openQuestions.question: Q5 IntelligenceSummaryCard counts + PredictionShowcaseCard 'we called it' (B3/B4): fold into value band/Results or drop?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Fold: counts into Results, we-called-it into the return-hook/value band (D2 work).

openQuestions.question: Q6 Will the operator Insights Engine host the full 21-type priority feed (covers search-traffic I1-I6 too)?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Yes — one DataTable/GroupBlock feed with severity pills + domain FilterChips; single decision shared with search-traffic + engine audits.

openQuestions.question: Q7 Intentional retirements: delete PerformancePulse dead export; keep resolve/queue endpoints MCP-only or add operator resolve UI?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Delete PerformancePulse in the C2 PR; keep resolution MCP-only (status quo, zero client risk), revisit with the Insights Engine build.

openQuestions.question: NEW: does this client-facing surface rebuild ride the C-lane flags (strategy-the-issue/client-ia-v2 per D4 Q5 global flip) rather than ui-rebuild-shell — i.e., is Insights sequenced inside C1->C2->C3, not the A-lane fan-out?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Yes: client render work lands in C2 re-skin; only the operator Insights Engine half (owned by engine.md) rides the A-lane shell flag. Confirm lane assignment before dispatch.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: D1 Operator send boundary (client sees only staged content)
kitNewFeatures.rationale: D4 Q4 explicitly rules it out of C1/C2 as a product/workflow change; needs sn-insights-1 plus an unstaged-nudge dark-loop guard.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: D2 'Since your last visit' return hook + delta chips + provenance value band
kitNewFeatures.rationale: Completes existing flag-gated HEAD seeds (the-issue-client-return-hook, outcomeProvenance.ts) — render-only, fits C2 zero-behavior-change re-skin as flag completion.

kitNewFeatures.proposal: D3 One-tap client greenlight on opportunities -> operator inbox as promotable request
kitNewFeatures.rationale: New two-way workflow (sn-insights-2); overlaps the recommendations respond loop — coordinate with that surface at C3.

Client Results slots (monthly digest, intelligence counts, we-called-it)
Operator Insights Engine feed (cross-ref engine.md — 21-type priority feed + recompute + diagnostic CTA, pending Q6)
composition.statesPlan: getSafe fallbacks already guarantee never-hard-fail; add explicit empty (onboarding checklist per A8), Skeleton loading, ErrorState per section, TierGate locked states per Q3.
composition.mountNote: Client half mounts inside the C2 re-skinned 4-tab IA (C-lane flags, global flip per D4 Q5), NOT ui-rebuild-shell; operator half mounts in the Insights Engine under RebuiltAppChrome (engine.md owns). @ds-rebuilt marker + FA icon remap (D5) on all rebuilt files.

crossSurfaceDeps: D4/C-lane sequencing: this surface's client half is gated on C1 cutover -> C2 re-skin, not the A-lane fan-out
engine.md owns the operator Insights Engine (signals digest, recompute, staging composition) this surface's client render depends on
recommendations surface must confirm pickup of B1 (InsightsEngine.tsx renders the recommendations set)
search-traffic I1-I6 admin insight feed shares the Q6 decision (Insights Engine as the 21-type feed home)
diagnostics ledger conflict (Gap row :384 vs improved row :417-420) needs reconciliation by the diagnostics owner
D5 icon system: InsightsDigest 21-entry lucide map remaps to FA ICON_NAMES
unknowns: B1 pickup by the Recommendations audit not verifiable from this seat (reading recs surface doc was out of scope)
Whether the Handoff Brief's 'Insights Engine' operator zone and the C2 client re-skin are dispatched as one lane or two (lane assignment question, newly-found open question)
Final Diagnostics ledger status (conflicting Gap vs improved rows) — owned elsewhere

verdicts.evidence: No staged/staging concept on the insight path. analytics_insights schema (server/db/migrations/035-analytics-insights.sql:4-13 base; 040-insight-resolution-tracking.sql:3-5 adds resolution_status/note/resolved_at; 044 adds bridge_source) has no staged/client-visibility column. AnalyticsInsight interface has no such field (shared/types/analytics.ts:217-241). Client narrative projection filters only impactScore>=20 and isClientInsightExcluded (server/client-insight-narrative-view-model.ts:20-24) — no staged-only read path. Effort 'M' is correct: needs migration + row-interface/mapper/serialization lockstep + new projection.

Unresolved-queue read exists and is a pure, workspace-scoped, side-effect-free SELECT: getUnresolvedInsights (server/analytics-insights-store.ts:324-326) over stmts().selectUnresolved (server/analytics-insights-store.ts:84-86, plain SELECT ... WHERE workspace_id=? AND resolution_status!='resolved'), backing GET /api/insights/:workspaceId/queue (server/routes/insights.ts:15-22) and MCP tool 'ln'/get_unresolved_insights (server/mcp/tools/insights.ts). No staged/nudge count and no insight->client-request graduation path exists: all 'nudge' hits are Strategy-v3 recommendation staleness (server/recommendation-staleness.ts), all 'graduate/promote' hits are outcome-provenance graduation (server/the-issue-outcome.ts:50, server/roi.ts:438, shared/types/outcome-tracking.ts:130), not insight lifecycle. 'partial' is accurate. Minor evidence-string imprecision (non-material): the queue handler is routes/insights.ts:15-22 and getUnresolvedInsights lives in analytics-insights-store.ts:324, not routes/insights.ts which only imports it.
